name: Fire Bolt
description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature within 120 feet.
effect: Deal 1d10 fire damage on a ranged spell attack hit.

name: Magic Missile
description: Three glowing darts of magical force strike targets of your choice.
effect: Deal 3d4+3 force damage, auto-hit, split among up to 3 targets.

name: Cure Wounds
description: Touch a creature and channel positive energy to heal its wounds.
effect: Restore 1d8+INT modifier HP to a creature you touch.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears to protect you.
effect: Reaction: +5 AC until the start of your next turn.

name: Sleep
description: Send creatures into a magical slumber with a wave of drowsiness.
effect: Roll 5d8; creatures with HP equal or below the total fall unconscious for 1 minute.

name: Detect Magic
description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet for up to 10 minutes.
effect: Reveal magical auras and identify the school of magic. Can see through thin walls.
